title: Fix location link and allow photo replacement in Services page

requirements.text: Update the Google Maps location link in the Footer component (frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx) to point to the correct office address for Vijay Sawkar's practice. Ensure the link opens in a new tab and displays the correct address text.

quotes: u didn't update the location either

acceptanceCriteria: The Google Maps link in the footer navigates to the correct business location
The link opens in a new tab
The displayed address text matches the actual location

requirements.text: In the Services page (frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx), replace the placeholder photo boxes in the Vastu Advance Course section with actual uploaded certificate or course images. If the correct image files cannot be determined automatically, render clearly labeled placeholder img tags with empty src attributes and alt text such as 'Course Photo 1' and 'Course Photo 2' so the user can manually supply the image files.

quotes: u didn't change the photos, if u can't atleast let me

acceptanceCriteria: The Vastu Advance Course section in Services.tsx shows actual img elements instead of empty div placeholders
Each img element has a descriptive alt attribute
If images are not available, the img src attributes are clearly marked so the user can supply the correct file paths
The layout and styling of the image containers is preserved

constraints: Do not modify any files listed under frontend.immutablePaths
Preserve the existing cosmic dark theme and layout styling
nonGoals: Changing the backend schema or data model
Modifying any other parts of the Services page beyond the Vastu Advance Course photo section
